Title: Establishes a portable clearance passport program to satisfy certain background checks
Summary: Directs the commissioner of the office of children and family services to develop a portable clearance passport program to provide a uniform process for conducting background checks for employment at certain participating agencies.
LawCode: Add Art 11-A §§500 - 505, Soc Serv L; amd §553, Exec L; add §2899-b, Pub Health L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, the executive law and the public health law, in relation to establishing a portable clearance passport program to satisfy certain background checks
